trigger: more than one new top-level window for one request correlation
same workspace identity visible in multiple unexpected windows
same instanceId visible in multiple windows
steps: freeze the exact operator invocation and request correlation
preserve the before and after inventories
group new windows by request correlation, workspace identity, instanceId, and tmux session
identify whether duplication originated in the caller, canonical launcher, WezTerm process flags, default_prog recursion, shortcut delegation, or repeated tmux attachment
record the first divergent boundary with stdout and stderr
produce one bounded repair hypothesis without changing product code in a harness-only lane
emit blocked or duplicate-detected result with one next diagnostic command
proofCeiling: Offline diagnosis contract over supplied or synthetic inventories only.
